Meet the Founder

Hi, I'm Kirsty

Welcome to Glow Lab Aesthetics — a boutique, home-based clinic nestled in Bridgwater, Somerset, built on a genuine passion for skincare and the belief that everyone deserves to feel confident in their own skin.

With over 21 years of experience in the ambulance service, I bring a level of clinical precision, care and safety to every treatment that sets Glow Lab apart. That background isn't just a detail — it means you're in exceptionally capable hands.

My approach is simple: listen first, treat second. Whether you're exploring aesthetics for the first time or looking for a practitioner you can truly trust, I'm here to guide you honestly, without pressure, and with results that always look natural. Booking is easy through Faces, where you'll also complete your consent forms and manage payments — all in one place.

Book with Kirsty

What We Offer

Treatments tailored
to your skin

01

Anti-Wrinkle Injections

Soften crow's feet, frown lines and forehead lines using botulinum toxin. Quick, minimally invasive with natural-looking results visible within two weeks.

2 areas £175  ·  3 areas £250
02

Classic Lip Fillers

Enhance shape, volume and definition with hyaluronic acid filler. Precise placement for soft, natural results that maintain your unique features.

1ml £250
03

Dermal Fillers

Soften nasolabial folds and marionette lines by restoring volume and supporting surrounding tissue for a refreshed, lifted appearance.

Per 1ml £250
04

Skin Boosters

Deep hydration and skin quality improvement using mesotherapy or BAP technique. Stimulates collagen for lasting radiance and elasticity.

Each £125  ·  Course of 3 £325
05

Skin Remodelling — Profhilo H+L

Bio-remodelling with one of the highest concentrations of hyaluronic acid available. Tightens, firms and rejuvenates without adding volume.

Course of 3 (BAP) £450
06

Polynucleotides — Eyes

Advanced regenerative treatment combining polynucleotides with mesotherapy to revitalise the under-eye area. Improves dark circles, fine lines and crepey skin.

Each £125  ·  Course of 3 £325
07

Glass Skin Facial

Fillmed NCTF 135HA meso & microneedling delivering hyaluronic acid, vitamins and antioxidants for a luminous glass-like complexion.

Each £150  ·  3 sessions £400  ·  6 sessions £750
08

Chemical Peels

Target pigmentation, texture and dullness with a tailored professional peel. Results build with each session for a clearer, more even complexion.

Each £75  ·  Course of 3 £200
09

Microneedling

Stimulate collagen and elastin for firmer, smoother skin. Effective for scarring, texture and overall skin quality with minimal downtime.

£75
10

Hydra-dermabrasion Facial

Non-invasive deep cleanse, exfoliation and hydration in one treatment. Suitable for all skin types, with no downtime and an instant glow.

£75
11

Dermaplaning

Remove dead skin cells and fine vellus hair for a smoother, brighter complexion. Creates the perfect base and improves product absorption.

£25  ·  £15 when combined with another treatment

Not sure which treatment is right for you?

How It Works

Your journey
to glowing skin

01

Book Online

Choose your treatment and a time that suits you. Booking takes two minutes.

02

Consultation

We assess your skin and goals in a no-obligation consultation before any treatment begins.

03

Treatment

Relax while your personalised treatment is carried out safely and comfortably.

04

Aftercare

Full aftercare guidance and a follow-up to make sure you're delighted with your results.
